description:
The HR department needs a strict database-level control to prevent salary overruns. Create a table named DEPT_SPENDING_CAPS with columns DEPARTMENT_ID (NUMBER, PK) and CAP_AMOUNT (NUMBER). Populate this table for all existing departments, calculating the cap as 120% of the current total salary (rounded to the nearest integer) or 10,000 for departments with no employees. Implement a trigger named TRG_ENFORCE_SPENDING_CAP on the EMPLOYEES table that fires on INSERT or UPDATE of SALARY or DEPARTMENT_ID. This trigger must block any transaction that causes a department's total salary to exceed its CAP_AMOUNT by raising application error ORA-20001 with the message 'Budget Exceeded'. The implementation must successfully handle the 'Mutating Table' constraint (ORA-04091).

Connection: Host=localhost, Port=1521, Service=XEPDB1, User=hr, Password=hr123.
